events.summary: Tier 2.2 pilot expansion: log initialized for in-flight feature (phase=implementation). Future multi-session events should be appended contemporaneously via scripts/append-feature-log.py rather than reconstructed from memory.

Manual rollback (user-approved): implementation → research. Audit UI-015 surfaced a structural PRD gap — the documented persistence target TrainingProgramData has no write path (it is a static struct). Reopening from research to redesign persistence + active-plan switching + sync + GDPR integration before any further code work.

Persistence + active-plan + GDPR + sync architecture research complete. Output: research-persistence-2026-05-06.md (12 sections, 8 PRD gaps catalogued, 11 risks registered, Phase 1 PRD outline pre-written). Decisions locked: EncryptedDataStore.importedTrainingPlans (6th encrypted .ftenc), ImportedTrainingPlan domain model, TrainingProgramStore as routing layer for active-plan switching, on-device-only sync (CloudKit/Supabase deferred to Phase 2), GDPR Art 17 free via deletePersistedData, GDPR Art 20 via DataExportService extension, 2 missing analytics constants added, 2 entry points (Settings + Training tab) + 1 new list view + 1 new detail view.

Research phase approved by user. research-persistence-2026-05-06.md closes the structural gap from audit UI-015. 8 PRD gaps catalogued, 11 risks registered, Phase 1 PRD outline pre-written, decisions locked in §9.
PRD phase opened after Research approval. Goal: rewrite docs/product/prd/import-training-plan.md against the §9 decision matrix and §11 outline from research-persistence-2026-05-06.md.

PRD v2 approved by user. Closes 8 v1 gaps, includes 14 P0 requirements grounded in file:line touch-points, Analytics Spec Gate passed (9 events validated), 7 risks registered with mitigation, primary conversion flipped from import_completed to import_plan_activated.

Tasks phase opened. Goal: re-decompose tasks.md against PRD v2 architecture (data model + persistence + 3 GDPR + active-plan + 4 UI surfaces + 9 analytics + 8 unit tests + 1 UI smoke); apply v5.1 complexity classifier for E-core/P-core lanes.

18-task v2 breakdown ready for approval. 15 E-core + 3 P-core (T5 TrainingProgramStore routing, T13 ImportedPlansListScreen, T14 ImportPreviewView day-assignment editor). 7.10 total effort days. Critical path 7 hops: T1→T2→T5→T13→T15→T17→T18.
Tasks v2 approved by user. 18-task breakdown (15 E-core + 3 P-core), 7.10 effort-days, 7-hop critical path.

Phase 3 (UX) opened. Three new UX surfaces to spec: ImportedPlansListScreen (Settings → Data → Imported Plans), day-assignment editor (extension to ImportPreviewView), active-plan badge wherever the active plan is referenced. Existing ux-spec.md covers picker + preview only; needs extension.

Phase 3 deliverables ready. ux-spec.md extended with 3 new surfaces (ImportedPlansListScreen, day-assignment editor, active-plan badge). UX heuristic self-validation: PASS (13 principles). Design system compliance self-audit: PASS (no new tokens, no new components). UX-build + design-build handoff prompts written to docs/prompts/.

User-ordered pre-Phase-4 UX/UI audit complete. Found 4 P0 spec errors (AppRadius.pill doesn't exist, AppMotion.standardEase doesn't exist, SettingsActionLabel can't carry inline badge, toast/snackbar component doesn't exist) + 3 P1 semantic mismatches (font weights, icon container shape) + 3 net-new app patterns required (swipe actions, context menu, ImportedPlanRow component). Verdict: APPROVED with corrections. Zero timeline cost — corrections absorbed into T13. New backlog task added: '/ux + /design skills pre-flight existence check'.
UX phase approved by user with all 10 pre-flight audit corrections (C1–C10). Spec verbal corrections will land as code-level decisions during Phase 4 — no spec rewrite needed.

Phase 4 (Implementation) opened. Branching feature/import-training-plan-resume off main. Executing 18 tasks per lane split (15 E-core sequential where deps require + 3 P-core: T5 routing, T13 list screen, T14 preview mode). Audit corrections applied: Capsule() not AppRadius.pill, AppEasing.short not AppMotion.standardEase, new ImportedPlanRow component, no toast (rely on ACTIVE pill cross-fade).

All 18 tasks done. 3 commits on feature/import-training-plan-resume: a2e757c (T1-T11+T16-T17 architecture+analytics), 54f8b26 (T13-T15 UI surfaces), 6f71ad8 (T12 finish + tests). xcodebuild build green; ui-audit P0=0.

Testing phase entered. 33 new tests added across persistence + active-plan routing + orchestrator + GDPR Article 17/20 + 9 analytics events. 49/49 tests in the import-related suites pass. analytics_verification_passed=true.
